vibe_and_space: Closed December 31, 2025. Per NOMFLUENCE 'the author's favorite restaurant' before closure. Chef Jun Nishiyama has since opened Rambu.
one_paragraph_recommendation: Closed Dec 31, 2025 — chef-lineage anchor for the openings-and-closings route. Chef Jun Nishiyama's new project is Rambu, which is the priority next-iteration target for tracking the lineage. Sage Gastro's closure illustrates the 'editorial-favorite closes when economics shift' pattern that the 2025 closure wave (~90+ notable closures per NOMFLUENCE) demonstrates. Do not recommend (closed); cite when tracking Chef Nishiyama's next concept.
